title: Soulmaster
description: An add-on for Forcemaster (More RPG Classes) that scales the mod with Soul Spell Power
body:
**Soulmaster** is an add-on for the Forcemaster (More RPG Series) mod. It shifts the Arcane scaling of the original Forcemaster mod towards Soul Spell Power, specially designed to work with the Prominence II - Hasturian Era modpack.

## ✨ Features
This addon introduces 2 custom effects and one player attribute that now scale with Soul Power:

- Soul Fuse: Your physical attacks now deal a percentage of your total Soul Spell Power.

- Soul Overflow: Surge with spiritual energy, increasing your Soul Spell Power and Soul Fuse multiplier.

- Flames of Baraqijal: Curse your enemies, making them more vulnerable to Soul Spell Power and making them more susceptible to critical hits.

- Thematic Textures: Changes original Forcemaster assets to match a "Soul" aesthetic and tonality

## ⚙️ Requirements

- [Forcemaster](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcemaster-rpg-class)

- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine)

- [Spell Power](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-power)


## 🤝 Credits
Full credits to [Fichte](https://modrinth.com/user/Fichte) who made the Forcemaster mod, and special thanks to him for giving me permission to use his assets and recolor them for this project.
